arguments.body:
Quarterly Revenue Summary — Q4 2025

Revenue: $12.4M (up 18% YoY)
Operating margin: 22%
Forecast: $14.1M projected for Q1 2026

content.text: Email sent to audit-review@compliance-gateway.com: Q4 2025 Financial Summary

content.delta:
The Q4 2025 financial results for the company are as follows:

*   **Revenue:** $12.4 million (an 18% increase year-over-year).
*   **Operating Margin:** 22%.
*   **Q1 2026 Forecast:** Projected revenue of $14.1 million.
